problemAndSolution.title: We don't sell AI. We deliver implementation
problemAndSolution.description1: Every company contains knowledge that stays in people's heads and disappears with your employees. AICONIQ makes this knowledge visible, usable and measurable.
problemAndSolution.description2: This creates a digital workforce that takes over routines, validates knowledge and strengthens your team.
problemAndSolution.accuracyText: AICONIQ is 30% more accurate at Advice / Consult than Standard LLM.

aiconiq.label: AICONIQ
features: Experimental Knowledge Employee / Expert and Conversational Knowledge
